algorithms.description: Minimize owner switches in trace linearizations
algorithms.complexity: O(n^2 * beam_width) for beam search, exponential for exact

budget_parameters.name: exact_threshold
budget_parameters.description: Maximum trace size for exact A* search

budget_parameters.name: beam_threshold
budget_parameters.description: Maximum trace size for beam search

budget_parameters.name: beam_width
budget_parameters.description: Number of candidate paths explored in parallel

budget_parameters.name: step_budget
budget_parameters.description: Absolute cap on search work before fallback

algorithms.description: Identify scheduling races for backtracking exploration
Produce canonical Foata normal form for trace equivalence
Prioritize exploration nodes by persistence homology novelty
algorithms.complexity: O(k) per node where k = number of persistence classes

steps: Emit structured log with algorithm, budget consumed, reason, fallback
Fallback result MUST be valid (correct linearization / sound analysis)

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify geodesic normalization respects step budget and falls back
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa062 cargo test --test cost_capped_exploration_contract geodesic -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify DPOR race detection produces sound analysis
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa062 cargo test --test cost_capped_exploration_contract dpor -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify Foata canonicalization stability and fingerprinting
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa062 cargo test --test cost_capped_exploration_contract canonical -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify fallback chain ordering and algorithm catalog
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa062 cargo test --test cost_capped_exploration_contract fallback -- --nocapture
